title: Meta Media Buying Professional
subtitle: 410-101 Exam · 60 questions · 105 min
description: Meta's official certification for media buyers. Covers Ads Manager, Business Suite, objectives, buying types, signals, audiences, creative and measurement.

units.title: Day 1 — Ads Manager + Business Suite
units.subtitle: Hierarchy, Advantage+, BP, portfolios, billing, brand safety

units.title: Day 2 — Campaign Objectives
units.subtitle: The 6 ODAX objectives, optimization events, signal optimization

units.title: Day 3 — Buying Types & Bid Strategies
units.subtitle: Auction vs Reservation, bid strategies, Learning Phase

units.title: Day 4 — Signals & Data
units.subtitle: Pixel + CAPI, events, AEM and iOS 14+

units.title: Day 5 — Audiences & Catalogs
units.subtitle: Custom audiences, Lookalike, Advantage+ Audience, Catalog Ads

units.title: Day 6 — Creative & Measurement
units.subtitle: Formats, A/B Test, Brand Lift, Conversion Lift, attribution
